::: {.hero-subsection}


# Research


:::

# Main questions

***How many different viruses are out there? Which species can they infect? How many different ones?
And what are the constraints to infect some species but not others?
By perusing an interdisciplinary approach spanning bioinformatics and molecular biology approaches, we are looking for answers to these questions.***



## Current Topics

- Virus discovery
- Virus evolution
- Host-virus interactions
